title: Extension of Quantum Error Correction
author: Singam, Amitesh Kumar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A Working Principle of Quantum Error Correction follows encoding, redundancy, error detection, correction and also includes no cloning theorem but our theory concludes with excluding no cloning theorem because of no chances of cloning quantum states due to introducing concealed error at feedback control within quantum control system framework as cited at[1] .
steps_raw: A Working Principle of Quantum Error Correction follows encoding, redundancy, error detection, correction and also includes no cloning theorem but our theory concludes with excluding no cloning theorem because of no chances of cloning quantum states due to introducing concealed error at feedback control within quantum control system framework as cited at[1] .
